qa_pairs.question: What is Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Nextcloud is a Dropbox-like cloud storage service provided for all Alliance users.

qa_pairs.question: Who can log in to the Alliance Nextcloud server?
qa_pairs.answer: All Alliance users can log in using their Alliance username and password.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL for the Alliance Nextcloud server?
qa_pairs.answer: The server URL is https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the Nextcloud user manual?
qa_pairs.answer: A complete Nextcloud user manual is available from the official Nextcloud documentation at https://docs.nextcloud.com/server/19/Nextcloud_User_Manual.pdf and https://docs.nextcloud.com/. A PDF version is also available under your account once you connect.

qa_pairs.question: Are data transfers to Alliance's Nextcloud secure?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, all data transfers between local devices and Alliance's Nextcloud are encrypted.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended maximum dataset size for the Nextcloud service?
qa_pairs.answer: The Nextcloud service is aimed at users with relatively small datasets, up to 100 GB.

qa_pairs.question: What service should I use if my dataset is larger than 100 GB?
qa_pairs.answer: For datasets larger than 100 GB, we recommend using the Globus service.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a demo available for Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if you are not familiar with the concept of Nextcloud, you may try the demo on the Nextcloud website at https://try.nextcloud.com/.

qa_pairs.question: What is the server location for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The Alliance Nextcloud server is located at Simon Fraser University in Burnaby, BC.

qa_pairs.question: What is the storage quota per user for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: There is a fixed quota of 100 GB per user.

qa_pairs.question: What is the backup policy for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The backup policy is daily backup without an offsite copy.

qa_pairs.question: What are the available access methods for Alliance Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: You can access Alliance Nextcloud using a Web interface, the Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client, Nextcloud mobile apps, and any WebDAV client.

qa_pairs.question: How do I use the Nextcloud web interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To use the web interface, log in to Alliance Nextcloud from a web browser using your Alliance username and password at https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca.

qa_pairs.question: What functionalities are available through the Nextcloud web interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Through the web interface, you can upload and download files, edit files, and share files with other Alliance users.

qa_pairs.question: How can I synchronize data from my computer or mobile device with Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download the Nextcloud Desktop Sync Client or Nextcloud mobile apps from https://nextcloud.com/install/ to synchronize data.

qa_pairs.question: What happens when I make local changes to files using the Nextcloud Desktop Synchronization Client?
qa_pairs.answer: When you make changes to files locally, they will be updated in Nextcloud automatically.

qa_pairs.question: How do WebDAV clients work with Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: WebDAV clients allow you to 'mount' a Nextcloud folder to your computer using the WebDAV URL: https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/remote.php/webdav/. Once mounted, you can drag and drop files.

qa_pairs.question: How do I connect to Nextcloud using a WebDAV client on Mac OSX?
qa_pairs.answer: On Mac OSX, select Go -> Connect to the Server, enter the WebDAV URL https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/remote.php/webdav/ for the Server Address, click Connect, and log in with your username and password.

qa_pairs.question: How do I connect to Nextcloud using a WebDAV client on Windows?
qa_pairs.answer: On Windows, use the 'Map Network Drive...' option, select a drive letter, and then use the WebDAV URL https://nextcloud.computecanada.ca/remote.php/webdav/ in the Folder field.

qa_pairs.question: Are there other WebDAV clients available for Mac OSX and Windows?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you may also consider using Cyberduck, which is available for OSX and Windows from https://cyberduck.io/, or other clients.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find recommendations for WebDAV applications on Linux?
qa_pairs.answer: You can consult the Nextcloud user manual for recommendations on WebDAV applications for Linux, as many are available.

qa_pairs.question: What is the key difference between WebDAV clients and Synchronization clients regarding file storage?
qa_pairs.answer: WebDAV clients mount your Nextcloud storage, meaning files are not copied locally and edits change the original file on the server. Synchronization clients, however, copy and synchronize files to your local computer, allowing for offline work.

qa_pairs.question: What is an advantage of using a Synchronization client over a WebDAV client?
qa_pairs.answer: An advantage of using a Synchronization client is that you can work on files offline, and they will be synchronized when network connectivity is re-established.

qa_pairs.question: What types of UNIX command line tools can be used with Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use any available WebDAV command line clients, such as curl (https://curl.haxx.se/) and cadaver (http://www.webdav.org/cadaver/), to copy files.

qa_pairs.question: When are UNIX command line tools particularly useful for Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Command line tools are useful when you want to copy data between a remote server you log in to and Nextcloud.
